zh.lifeSummary: 當Adele de Normandie Comtesse de Blois於1062年5月24日出生在法國諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯法拉時，她的父親William I 'the Conqueror' King of England35歲，母親Mathilde of Flanders Queen Consort of England30歲。她於大約1082年與Étienne II de Blois comte de Chartres et de Meaux在法國諾門迪艾布利易爾-素-易頓結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1137年3月8日在法國布格薩o-吉洛易馬尼享年74歲，埋葬在法國巴-諾門迪。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adele de Normandie Comtesse de Blois于1062年5月24日出生在法国諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯法拉时，她的父亲William I 'the Conqueror' King of England35岁，母亲Mathilde of Flanders Queen Consort of England30岁。她于大约1082年与Étienne II de Blois comte de Chartres et de Meaux在法国諾門迪艾布利易爾-素-易頓结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1137年3月8日在法国布格薩o-吉洛易馬尼享年74岁，埋葬在法国巴-諾門迪。

nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Normandie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Alain, Serge, Adrien, Andre, Aurore, Celine, Clovis, Emile, Gaetan, Gilles, Laurier.
French: from a diminutive of   Normand  . Compare   Normandy  .

variants.name: Normand
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Gaston, Andre, Laurent, Marcel, Pierre, Amie, Donat, Emile, Herve, Jacques, Jean Noel, Jean-Michel.
French and Breton (mainly Finistère; also Le Normand): habitational name for someone from Normandy, a region in northern France (see Norman ). Compare Lenormand .

variants.name: Normandy
meanings: English: habitational name from Normandy in northern France. This surname is now rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Adele
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From French Adèle , an ancient name popular in medieval Europe because of the fame of a 7th-century saint, a daughter of the Frankish king Dagobert II. It is of Germanic origin, from adal ‘noble’ (a short form of a two-element name such as Adelheid; see Adelaide ). It was the name of William the Conqueror's youngest daughter ( c.1062–1137 ), who became the wife of Stephen of Blois. However, it died out in England in the later Middle Ages. It was revived in the 19th century, being the name of a character in Johann Strauss's opera Die Fledermaus. Its popularity was further reinforced in the 1930s as the name of a character in the novels of Dornford Yates .

variants.name: Adel
meanings: From French Adèle , an ancient name popular in medieval Europe because of the fame of a 7th-century saint, a daughter of the Frankish king Dagobert II. It is of Germanic origin, from adal ‘noble’ (a short form of a two-element name such as Adelheid; see Adelaide ). It was the name of William the Conqueror's youngest daughter ( c.1062–1137 ), who became the wife of Stephen of Blois. However, it died out in England in the later Middle Ages. It was revived in the 19th century, being the name of a character in Johann Strauss's opera Die Fledermaus. Its popularity was further reinforced in the 1930s as the name of a character in the novels of Dornford Yates .

variants.name: Adelle
meanings: From French Adèle , an ancient name popular in medieval Europe because of the fame of a 7th-century saint, a daughter of the Frankish king Dagobert II. It is of Germanic origin, from adal ‘noble’ (a short form of a two-element name such as Adelheid; see Adelaide ). It was the name of William the Conqueror's youngest daughter ( c.1062–1137 ), who became the wife of Stephen of Blois. However, it died out in England in the later Middle Ages. It was revived in the 19th century, being the name of a character in Johann Strauss's opera Die Fledermaus. Its popularity was further reinforced in the 1930s as the name of a character in the novels of Dornford Yates .

en.lifeSummary: When Adele de Normandie Comtesse de Blois was born on 24 May 1062, in Falaise, Calvados, Normandy, France, her father, William I 'the Conqueror' King of England, was 35 and her mother, Mathilde of Flanders Queen Consort of England, was 30. She married Étienne II de Blois comte de Chartres et de Meaux about 1082, in Breteuil-sur-Iton, Eure, Normandy, France. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 6 daughters. She died on 8 March 1137, in Marcigny, Saône-et-Loire, Burgundy, France, at the age of 74, and was buried in Lower Normandy, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adele de Normandie Comtesse de Blois est née le 24 mai 1062, à Falaise, Calvados, Normandie, France, son père, William I 'the Conqueror' King of England, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Mathilde of Flanders Queen Consort of England, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Étienne II de Blois comte de Chartres et de Meaux environ 1082, à Breteuil-sur-Iton, Eure, Normandie, France. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée le 8 mars 1137, à Marcigny, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne, France, à l’âge de 74 ans, et a été enterrée à Basse-Normandie, France.

de.Mexborough, Metropolitan Borough of Donc: Mexborough, South Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Adele de Normandie Comtesse de Blois am 24. Mai 1062 in Falaise, Calvados, Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William I 'the Conqueror' King of England 35 und ihre Mutter Mathilde of Flanders Queen Consort of England 30. Sie hat um 1082 in Breteuil-sur-Iton, Eure, Normandie, Frankreich Étienne II de Blois comte de Chartres et de Meaux geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb am 8. März 1137 im Alter von 74 Jahren in Marcigny, Saône-et-Loire, Burgund, Frankreich und wurde in Basse-Normandie, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adele de Normandie Comtesse de Blois è nata il il 24 maggio 1062 nel Falaise, Calvados, Normandie, Francia, sua padre, William I 'the Conqueror' King of England, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Mathilde of Flanders Queen Consort of England, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Étienne II de Blois comte de Chartres et de Meaux circa 1082, nel Breteuil-sur-Iton, Eure, Normandie, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 8 marzo 1137, nel Marcigny, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne, Francia, all'età di 74 anni, e fu sepolta a Basse-Normandie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Adele de Normandie Comtesse de Bloisが1062年5月24日にフランスノーマンディカルヴァドスファレイゼで生まれた時，父William I 'the Conqueror' King of Englandは35歳，母Mathilde of Flanders Queen Consort of Englandは30歳であった。約1082年にフランスノーマンディエウアブレテウイル-スル-イトンでÉtienne II de Blois comte de Chartres et de Meauxと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1137年3月8日にフランスボウルゴグンサoネ-エト-ロイアーマルシグニーで74歳で死去し，フランスバセ-ノーマンディにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Adele de Normandie Comtesse de Blois(이)가 1062년 5월 24일 프랑스 노먼디 캘바도스 팔레이스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William I 'the Conqueror' King of England(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mathilde of Flanders Queen Consort of England(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 대략 1082년 프랑스 노먼디 우르 브레테우이-수-이턴에서 Étienne II de Blois comte de Chartres et de Meaux(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1137년 3월 8일 프랑스 부르고그니 사o니-트-로이르 마시그니에서 74세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 배세-노먼디에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adele de Normandie Comtesse de Blois nasceu em 24 de maio de 1062, em Falaise, Calvados, Normandie, França, seu pai, William I 'the Conqueror' King of England, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Mathilde of Flanders Queen Consort of England, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Étienne II de Blois comte de Chartres et de Meaux aproximadamente 1082, em Breteuil-sur-Iton, Eure, Normandie, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 8 de março de 1137, em Marcigny, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne, França, com 74 anos, e foi sepultada em Basse-Normandie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adele de Normandie Comtesse de Blois родилась 24 мая 1062 г. в местности фалеис, калвадос, норманди, Франция, её отцу по имени William I 'the Conqueror' King of England было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Mathilde of Flanders Queen Consort of England, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Étienne II de Blois comte de Chartres et de Meaux около 1082 г. в местности бретеуил-сур-итон, эур, норманди, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Она умерла 8 марта 1137 г. в местности марсигни, саoне-ет-лоир, бургогн, Франция в возрасте 74 лет и была похоронена в местности бассе-норманди, Франция.

es.Mexborough, Metropolitan Borough of Donc: Mexborough, South Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adele de Normandie Comtesse de Blois nació el 24 de mayo de 1062, en Falaise, Calvados, Normandie, Francia, su papá, William I 'the Conqueror' King of England, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Mathilde of Flanders Queen Consort of England, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Étienne II de Blois comte de Chartres et de Meaux aproximadamente 1082, en Breteuil-sur-Iton, Eure, Normandie, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 8 de marzo de 1137, en Marcigny, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne, Francia, a la edad de 74 años, y fue sepultada en Basse-Normandie, Francia.
